reference: THEN THE EUNUCH WENT OUT TO ZAU AL MAKAN AND SAID TO HIM RECITE WHAT VERSES THOU KNOWEST FOR MY LADY IS HERE HARD BY LISTENING TO THEE AND AFTER I WILL ASK THEE OF THY NAME AND THY NATIVE COUNTRY AND THY CONDITION
text: Then the eunuch went out to Zau al-Makan and said to him, "Recite what verses thou knowest, for my ladies hear hard by, listening to thee. And after, I will ask thee of thy name and thy native country and thy condition."
